V1.name: Fundamentals Trajectory
V1.rationale: Pre-revenue explorer with no earnings/revenue. First production 2028+. Project milestones advancing (EL, PFS, DFS awarded, pilot confirmed) but no fundamental inflection yet. Management alignment moderate — Gale comp 81% equity-linked, insider ownership ~3.2%, no structural constraints on capital allocation. (Source: Annual Report Mar 2026, PFS Jul 2025)

V2.name: Valuation Mismatch
V2.rationale: ~50-55% discount to interpolated PFS NPV8 (~A$500M mkt cap vs ~A$1.05B at current NdPr). But standard PFS-stage discounts are 40-60% — some of this is rational, not mispricing. Market has partially repriced (+90% 1yr). 2-3 analysts covering. Partial mismatch, not full. (Source: PFS 4-scenario data, presentations Feb 2026)

V3.name: Identifiable Mispricing Reason
V3.rationale: Specific reasons: thin coverage (2-3 analysts), pre-revenue exclusion from fund mandates, Brazil jurisdiction discount, serial dilution overhang. Coverage gap and pre-revenue exclusion are demonstrably temporary (resolve with DFS/production). Brazil discount and dilution pattern are partially structural. Mix of temporary + structural = 3. (Source: NOTES.md, Risk Assessment)

V4.name: Downside Protection
V4.rationale: No hard asset floor — net assets A$53.9M vs ~A$500M mkt cap (<11%). Stock demonstrated -79% peak-to-trough volatility. Multiple failure modes (DFS disappoints, permitting delay, NdPr collapse, funding gap, IXR pattern). Pre-revenue explorers have inherently weak downside protection. (Source: Annual Report Mar 2026, Risk Assessment)

V5.name: Thesis Simplicity
V5.rationale: Five conditions required: (1) DFS confirms economics — UNCONFIRMED; (2) LI granted — UNCONFIRMED (applied); (3) Project financing secured — UNCONFIRMED (non-binding LOIs only); (4) Binding offtake — UNCONFIRMED; (5) NdPr prices supportive — HOLDING at ~$115-120/kg. All must eventually be met.

V6.name: Upside Optionality
V6.rationale: Five independent paths: (1) NdPr price spike (each $10/kg = US$145-185M NPV); (2) HREE premium expansion (Dy/Tb supply gap); (3) MagBras/BNDES strategic partnership (VP Alckmin engagement); (4) Resource expansion (1.5Bt, only 7% in reserves); (5) Downstream integration (MTM separation demo). Base case is conservative relative to optionality.

V7.name: Evidence Quality
V7.rationale: Strong factual base for what exists: audited financials, published PFS, pilot plant confirmed, permitting verified from 14 quarterlies + annual report. But thesis critically depends on prospective events (DFS, financing, offtake) that are genuinely uncertain. Mix of strong facts + inferential forward assumptions. (Source: Annual Report, PFS, ASX announcements)

V8.name: Catalyst Clarity
V8.rationale: Two near-term dated catalysts: DFS mid-2026 (Ausenco, in progress) and LI target Jun 2026 (submitted Mar 9). Beyond those, timing is uncertain: offtake conversion unknown, financing post-DFS with no date, production 2028+. Know WHAT should reprice; only roughly know WHEN for nearest two. (Source: ASX announcements, Quarterly Dec 2025)

rcChecklist.criterion: Latest annual filing (10-K/20-F) reviewed within 12 months
≥2 earnings transcripts reviewed (or waived if ticker has no transcripts available)
rcChecklist.evidence: no Transcripts/ folder, zero transcript rows, no inline citation
no forward catalyst found — update catalyst-tracker or THESIS Catalyst Timeline

rcChecklist.criterion: debate-session run across all 6 pressure vectors
conviction-scoring + cross-model-validation council both complete; angels-advocate if band ≥ HIGH_CONVICTION
rcChecklist.evidence: run cross-model-validation + conviction-scoring (+ angels-advocate if HIGH_CONVICTION)
